mapper.select:
SELECT cs.id, cs.title, cs.content, cs.location, cs.final_score AS finalScore, cs.submit_time AS submitTime,
u.username AS authorName,
rf.file_url AS authorAvatar,
img.file_url AS coverUrl
FROM challenge_submission cs
LEFT JOIN challenge_application ca ON cs.application_id = ca.id
LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN resource_file rf ON rf.biz_id = u.id AND rf.biz_type = 'AVATAR'
LEFT JOIN resource_file img ON img.biz_id = cs.id AND img.biz_type = 'SUBMISSION_IMAGE'
WHERE ca.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND cs.status = 1
ORDER BY cs.final_score DESC, cs.submit_time DESC
